BAMBOO - 7202 MENAUL BLVD NE - Unsatisfactory Re-Inspection required BAMBOO - 7202 MENAUL BLVD NE Food Establishment Class C Date: 07/10/2026 - #: CAC-Food-065183-2026 - Inspection Result: Unsatisfactory Re-Inspection required Facility is being re-opened under a grade of Unsatisfactory. Facility had minimal live cockroaches present in the warewashing area, and in the dining room service area. Facility had numerous dead cockroaches which was instructed to be removed, with the areas cleaned and sanitized prior to resuming operations. Facility began cleaning, and sanitizing during the inspection. Areas of the facility including walls, sides of equipment, shelving, and the interior of slicing equipment still had debris accumulation. Additionally, holes, gaps, cracks, and crevices were still noted throughout the facility.
